canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>sonar</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #000; overflow: hidden; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
let W, H, cx, cy;

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  cx = W / 2;
  cy = H / 2;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Audio setup
const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
let audioStarted = false;

function startAudio() {
  if (!audioStarted && audioCtx.state === 'suspended') {
    audioCtx.resume();
  }
  audioStarted = true;
}

function playPing(freq = 1200, duration = 0.15, volume = 0.3) {
  if (!audioStarted) return;
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  
  osc.type = 'sine';
  osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, audioCtx.currentTime);
  osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(freq * 0.7, audioCtx.currentTime + duration);
  
  filter.type = 'lowpass';
  filter.frequency.value = 2000;
  filter.Q.value = 5;
  
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(volume, audioCtx.currentTime);
  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + duration);
  
  osc.connect(filter);
  filter.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  osc.start();
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + duration);
}

function playEcho(delay, intensity) {
  if (!audioStarted) return;
  setTimeout(() => {
    playPing(800 + Math.random() * 200, 0.08, intensity * 0.15);
  }, delay);
}

// Sonar state
let sweepAngle = 0;
const sweepSpeed = 0.015;
let lastPingAngle = 0;
const pingInterval = Math.PI / 6;

// Contacts - things in the deep
const contacts = [];
const maxContacts = 12;

function spawnContact() {
  const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
  const dist = 100 + Math.random() * (Math.min(W, H) * 0.4);
  contacts.push({
    x: cx + Math.cos(angle) * dist,
    y: cy + Math.sin(angle) * dist,
    size: 8 + Math.random() * 25,
    depth: Math.random(),
    vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3,
    vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3,
    type: Math.random() > 0.7 ? 'large' : 'small',
    lastSeen: -10,
    echoStrength: 0
  });
}

for (let i = 0; i < maxContacts; i++) spawnContact();

// Terrain - underwater ridges
const terrain = [];
const terrainSegments = 60;
for (let i = 0; i < terrainSegments; i++) {
  const angle = (i / terrainSegments) * Math.PI * 2;
  const baseRadius = Math.min(W, H) * 0.35;
  const noise = Math.sin(angle * 3) * 40 + Math.sin(angle * 7) * 20 + Math.sin(angle * 13) * 10;
  terrain.push({
    angle: angle,
    radius: baseRadius + noise + Math.random() * 30
  });
}

// Sweep history for fade effect
const sweepHistory = [];
const maxSweepHistory = 150;

// Mouse interaction
let mouseX = cx, mouseY = cy;
let manualPing = false;

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', e => {
  startAudio();
  manualPing = true;
  playPing(1400, 0.2, 0.5);
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
  startAudio();
  manualPing = true;
  playPing(1400, 0.2, 0.5);
});

// Echo ripples from pings
const ripples = [];

function addRipple(x, y, maxRadius) {
  ripples.push({
    x, y,
    radius: 0,
    maxRadius: maxRadius,
    alpha: 1
  });
}

function update() {
  // Sweep rotation
  sweepAngle += sweepSpeed;
  if (sweepAngle > Math.PI * 2) sweepAngle -= Math.PI * 2;
  
  // Automatic ping sound at intervals
  if (sweepAngle - lastPingAngle > pingInterval || sweepAngle < lastPingAngle) {
    lastPingAngle = sweepAngle;
    playPing(1200, 0.12, 0.2);
    addRipple(cx, cy, Math.min(W, H) * 0.5);
  }
  
  // Manual ping burst
  if (manualPing) {
    manualPing = false;
    addRipple(cx, cy, Math.min(W, H) * 0.6);
    
    // Check all contacts for echo
    contacts.forEach(c => {
      const dx = c.x - cx;
      const dy = c.y - cy;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
      const intensity = Math.max(0, 1 - dist / (Math.min(W, H) * 0.5));
      if (intensity > 0.1) {
        playEcho(dist * 2, intensity);
        c.echoStrength = 1;
        c.lastSeen = sweepAngle;
      }
    });
  }
  
  // Update contacts
  contacts.forEach(c => {
    c.x += c.vx;
    c.y += c.vy;
    
    // Bounce off edges
    const dist = Math.sqrt((c.x - cx) ** 2 + (c.y - cy) ** 2);
    if (dist > Math.min(W, H) * 0.45) {
      const angle = Math.atan2(c.y - cy, c.x - cx);
      c.vx = -Math.cos(angle) * 0.3;
      c.vy = -Math.sin(angle) * 0.3;
    }
    
    // Check if sweep passes over
    const contactAngle = Math.atan2(c.y - cy, c.x - cx);
    const normalizedContact = (contactAngle + Math.PI * 2) % (Math.PI * 2);
    const normalizedSweep = sweepAngle % (Math.PI * 2);
    
    if (Math.abs(normalizedContact - normalizedSweep) < 0.05) {
      c.lastSeen = sweepAngle;
      c.echoStrength = 1;
      const intensity = Math.max(0, 1 - dist / (Math.min(W, H) * 0.5));
      if (intensity > 0.2) {
        playEcho(dist * 1.5, intensity * 0.5);
      }
    }
    
    // Fade echo
    c.echoStrength *= 0.98;
  });
  
  // Update ripples
  ripples.forEach(r => {
    r.radius += 4;
    r.alpha = 1 - (r.radius / r.maxRadius);
  });
  
  // Remove dead ripples
  for (let i = ripples.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (ripples[i].alpha <= 0) ripples.splice(i, 1);
  }
  
  // Store sweep history
  sweepHistory.push({
    angle: sweepAngle,
    time: Date.now()
  });
  if (sweepHistory.length > maxSweepHistory) sweepHistory.shift();
}

function draw() {
  // Dark ocean background
  ctx.fillStyle = '#020408';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  const maxRadius = Math.min(W, H) * 0.45;
  
  // Draw range rings
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 200, 0.1)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx, cy, maxRadius * (i / 5), 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  
  // Draw bearing lines
  for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
    const angle = (i / 12) * Math.PI * 2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(cx, cy);
    ctx.lineTo(cx + Math.cos(angle) * maxRadius, cy + Math.sin(angle) * maxRadius);
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 200, 0.05)';
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  
  // Draw terrain echoes
  ctx.beginPath();
  terrain.forEach((t, i) => {
    const ageDiff = (sweepAngle - t.angle + Math.PI * 2) % (Math.PI * 2);
    const fade = Math.max(0, 1 - ageDiff / (Math.PI * 0.5));
    
    if (fade > 0) {
      const x = cx + Math.cos(t.angle) * t.radius;
      const y = cy + Math.sin(t.angle) * t.radius;
      
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(0, 255, 200, ${fade * 0.3})`;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }
  });
  
  // Draw contacts
  contacts.forEach(c => {
    const ageDiff = (sweepAngle - c.lastSeen + Math.PI * 2) % (Math.PI * 2);
    const fade = Math.max(0, 1 - ageDiff / (Math.PI * 1.5));
    
    if (fade > 0.01) {
      // Depth affects color: shallow = cyan, deep = pink
      const r = Math.floor(255 * c.depth);
      const g = Math.floor(255 * (1 - c.depth) * 0.8);
      const b = Math.floor(200 + 55 * c.depth);
      
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${fade * 0.9})`;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(c.x, c.y, c.size * fade, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
      
      // Echo glow
      if (c.echoStrength > 0.1) {
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(0, 255, 255, ${c.echoStrength * 0.5})`;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(c.x, c.y, c.size * 1.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
      }
      
      // Classification text for larger contacts
      if (c.type === 'large' && fade > 0.5) {
        ctx.font = '10px monospace';
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(0, 255, 200, ${fade * 0.7})`;
        ctx.fillText('CONTACT', c.x + c.size + 5, c.y);
        ctx.fillText(`D:${Math.floor(c.depth * 1000)}m`, c.x + c.size + 5, c.y + 12);
      }
    }
  });
  
  // Draw ping ripples
  ripples.forEach(r => {
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(0, 255, 200, ${r.alpha * 0.3})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(r.x, r.y, r.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.stroke();
  });
  
  // Sweep fade trail
  const sweepLength = Math.PI * 0.4;
  const gradient = ctx.createConicGradient(sweepAngle - sweepLength, cx, cy);
  gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0, 255, 200, 0)');
  gradient.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(0, 255, 200, 0.05)');
  gradient.addColorStop(0.95, 'rgba(0, 255, 200, 0.15)');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 255, 200, 0.3)');
  
  ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(cx, cy);
  ctx.arc(cx, cy, maxRadius, sweepAngle - sweepLength, sweepAngle);
  ctx.closePath();
  ctx.fill();
  
  // Sweep line
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#00ffc8';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.shadowColor = '#00ffc8';
  ctx.shadowBlur = 15;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(cx, cy);
  ctx.lineTo(cx + Math.cos(sweepAngle) * maxRadius, cy + Math.sin(sweepAngle) * maxRadius);
  ctx.stroke();
  ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
  
  // Center pip
  ctx.fillStyle = '#00ffc8';
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(cx, cy, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fill();
  
  // Mouse bearing indicator
  const mouseAngle = Math.atan2(mouseY - cy, mouseX - cx);
  const mouseDist = Math.sqrt((mouseX - cx) ** 2 + (mouseY - cy) ** 2);
  if (mouseDist > 50 && mouseDist < maxRadius) {
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.3)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.setLineDash([5, 10]);
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(cx, cy);
    ctx.lineTo(mouseX, mouseY);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.setLineDash([]);
    
    // Bearing readout
    const bearing = ((mouseAngle * 180 / Math.PI) + 90 + 360) % 360;
    ctx.font = '12px monospace';
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.7)';
    ctx.fillText(`BRG: ${bearing.toFixed(0)}°`, mouseX + 10, mouseY - 10);
  }
  
  // HUD elements
  ctx.font = '14px monospace';
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 200, 0.7)';
  ctx.fillText('SONAR', 20, 30);
  ctx.fillText(`SWEEP: ${((sweepAngle * 180 / Math.PI) % 360).toFixed(0)}°`, 20, 50);
  ctx.fillText(`CONTACTS: ${contacts.length}`, 20, 70);
  ctx.fillText('CLICK TO PING', 20, H - 20);
  
  // Depth scale
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.5)';
  ctx.fillText('DEEP', W - 60, 30);
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 200, 0.5)';
  ctx.fillText('SHALLOW', W - 80, H - 20);
  
  // Gradient depth indicator
  const depthGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(W - 20, 50, W - 20, H - 40);
  depthGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.7)');
  depthGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 255, 200, 0.7)');
  ctx.fillStyle = depthGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(W - 25, 50, 10, H - 90);
}

function loop() {
  update();
  draw();
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}

loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
